title: Torrcli
description: A terminal-based BitTorrent client offering torrent management, searching, streaming, and downloading via an intuitive CLI.

title: Kargo
description: An open-source PaaS built on Kubernetes allowing users to deploy Docker images with a simplified Heroku-like experience.

title: Crate
description: A daemonless container runtime written in Go supporting rootless/rootful containers, Linux namespace isolation, OCI image handling, and lightweight container lifecycle management.

title: Rendition
description: Distributed video transcoding system with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, and S3-compatible storage. Supports presigned multipart uploads, worker-based ffmpeg HLS encoding, outbox-backed job publishing, source-aware renditions, stale-job recovery, retry handling, playback playlist generation, and local MinIO or production S3/R2 deployments.

title: perfmon
description: A terminal-based Linux system monitor and control utility written in Go, featuring live CPU, memory, thermal, power, GPU, and process telemetry alongside interactive controls for CPU governors, EPP, turbo boost, power profiles, and CPU core online state through kernel sysfs interfaces.

title: PastezBin
description: A browser-based paste tool that compresses text and images directly into URLs using Deflate and base64 encoding.

title: Disco-AI
description: An AI-powered Discord bot with chat features, automation tools, polls, summaries, and reminder management.

title: nmsurf
description: A minimal NetworkManager frontend in Go for launcher-based environments like Wofi and Rofi, enabling fast Wi-Fi management.

title: Lofi
description: A minimal lofi music listening website built with React, featuring animated backgrounds and keyboard-driven controls.

title: Vellorun
description: A gamified exploration app with AI-driven suggestions, XP progression, and interactive map-based discovery.

title: 2D Car Racer
description: A 2D racing game built with Python and Pygame featuring obstacle generation and real-time scoring.

title: Elecshion
description: A desktop voting system built with Python for managing school elections with CSV imports and graphical result visualization.
